mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in industrial production signals improving real activity and operating leverage for listed firms; higher INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest available vintage for 2007-02 was positive in level at 113.1433
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth has nonpositive walk-forward Rank IC for 20-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5% raises the equity discount rate and increases refinancing pressure, so elevated FEDFUNDS predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest available vintage for 2007-03 was 5.26
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening residential investment and future credit losses; falling HOUST momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest available vintage for 2007-02 was 1525 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines below the trigger are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate with continued payroll expansion indicates labor income support without recession stress; falling UNRATE and rising PAYEMS jointly predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 5.0% and PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
series:PAYEMS
fact:UNRATE latest available vintage for 2007-03 was 4.4
fact:PAYEMS latest available vintage for 2007-03 was 137622
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor market
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE and positive-PAYEMS condition has lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than periods without the condition.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales indicate resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth; positive RSAFS momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest available vintage for 2007-02 was 367539 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS strength is followed by below-baseline 5-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward test years.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation together with a high policy rate signals restrictive real monetary conditions and margin pressure; elevated CPIAUCSL growth and FEDFUNDS jointly predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 12-month percent change is above 2.5% and FEDFUNDS is above 4.5%
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:CPIAUCSL latest available vintage for 2007-02 was 203.906
fact:FEDFUNDS latest available vintage for 2007-03 was 5.26
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-and-rate trigger has nonnegative 60-day return alpha after controlling for unconditional market drift in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth below its recent trend signals broad demand deceleration that reduces expected earnings; weak GDPC1 momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:GDPC1 latest available vintage for 2006-10 was 11513.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered weak-GDPC1 observations show positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and no negative mean return differential versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate while payrolls stagnate marks transition from expansion to labor-market stress; UNRATE deterioration with weak PAYEMS predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points in 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month change is below 100 thousand
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
series:PAYEMS
fact:UNRATE latest available vintage for 2007-03 was 4.4
fact:PAYEMS latest available vintage for 2007-03 was 137622
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-stress trigger is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.
